# 🧾 PURCHASE ORDER SYSTEM - DATA MODEL & ARCHITECTURE

**Version:** 1.0  
**Date:** March 1, 2026  
**Compliance:** South African Accounting Standards  

---

## 📊 FIRESTORE COLLECTIONS STRUCTURE

### **1. `purchaseOrders` Collection**

**Document ID:** Auto-generated by Firestore  
**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/purchaseOrders/{poId}`

```typescript
interface PurchaseOrder {
  // Identification
  poNumber: string;                    // "PO-2026-0001" or Zoho PO number
  organizationId: string;              // Organization reference
  source: 'manual' | 'zoho';           // Where PO originated
  zohoPoId?: string;                   // Zoho PO ID if synced
  
  // Supplier Information
  supplierId: string;                  // Reference to suppliers collection
  supplierName: string;                // Denormalized for quick display
  supplierEmail: string;
  supplierPhone?: string;
  supplierAddress: {
    street: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
    postalCode: string;
    country: string;                   // Default: "South Africa"
  };
  supplierTaxNumber?: string;          // VAT registration number
  
  // Purchase Order Details
  status: POStatus;                    // Current workflow state
  title: string;                       // Brief description
  description?: string;                // Detailed notes
  referenceNumber?: string;            // Internal reference
  
  // Financial Information
  currency: string;                    // "ZAR", "USD", "EUR", etc.
  exchangeRate: number;                // Rate to base currency (ZAR)
  subtotal: number;                    // Sum of line items before tax
  vatAmount: number;                   // 15% VAT for South Africa
  vatRate: number;                     // 0.15 (15%)
  discountAmount: number;              // Total discount applied
  discountPercentage: number;          // Percentage discount
  shippingCost: number;                // Delivery charges
  otherCharges: number;                // Additional fees
  totalAmount: number;                 // Final amount including VAT
  
  // Payment Terms
  paymentTerms: PaymentTerms;          // "30_DAYS", "60_DAYS", "COD", etc.
  paymentTermsDays?: number;           // Custom days if not standard
  paymentDueDate?: Date;               // Calculated based on terms
  paymentStatus: PaymentStatus;        // "unpaid", "partial", "paid"
  amountPaid: number;                  // Amount paid so far
  
  // Important Dates
  issueDate: Date;                     // When PO was created
  expectedDeliveryDate?: Date;         // Expected arrival
  deliveryDate?: Date;                 // Actual delivery date
  approvalDate?: Date;                 // When approved
  sentDate?: Date;                     // When sent to supplier
  closedDate?: Date;                   // When PO was closed
  
  // Line Items (embedded for performance)
  lineItems: POLineItem[];             // Products/services ordered
  
  // Approval Workflow
  approvalRequired: boolean;           // Does this PO need approval?
  approvalStatus: ApprovalStatus;      // "pending", "approved", "rejected"
  approvedBy?: string;                 // User ID who approved
  rejectedBy?: string;                 // User ID who rejected
  rejectionReason?: string;            // Why rejected
  
  // Delivery Information
  deliveryAddress: {
    street: string;
    city: string;
    province: string;
    postalCode: string;
    country: string;
  };
  deliveryInstructions?: string;
  deliveryNoteId?: string;             // Reference to delivery note
  
  // Shipping Information
  shippingMethod?: string;             // "Courier", "Own Transport", etc.
  trackingNumber?: string;             // Courier tracking
  shippingLabelId?: string;            // Reference to shipping label
  
  // System Fields
  createdBy: string;                   // User ID
  createdByName: string;               // User display name
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedBy: string;
  updatedByName: string;
  updatedAt: Date;
  
  // Flags
  isActive: boolean;                   // Soft delete flag
  isSynced: boolean;                   // Synced with Zoho?
  lastSyncAt?: Date;                   // Last Zoho sync time
  
  // Attachments
  attachments: POAttachment[];         // Quotes, contracts, etc.
  
  // Notes & Communication
  internalNotes?: string;              // Private notes
  supplierNotes?: string;              // Notes visible to supplier
  
  // Email Tracking
  emailsSent: EmailLog[];              // History of PO emails sent
}
```

### **2. `suppliers` Collection**

**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/suppliers/{supplierId}`

```typescript
interface Supplier {
  // Basic Information
  supplierId: string;                  // Auto-generated
  supplierCode?: string;               // Internal code
  name: string;                        // Company name
  tradingAs?: string;                  // Trading name if different
  
  // Contact Information
  primaryContact: {
    name: string;
    email: string;
    phone: string;
    mobile?: string;
    position?: string;
  };
  alternateContacts: Contact[];        // Additional contacts
  
  // Business Details
  taxNumber?: string;                  // VAT registration
  registrationNumber?: string;         // Company registration
  website?: string;
  industry?: string;
  
  // Address
  billingAddress: Address;
  shippingAddress: Address;
  sameAsbilling: boolean;             // Shipping = billing?
  
  // Financial
  defaultCurrency: string;             // "ZAR"
  defaultPaymentTerms: PaymentTerms;   // Default terms for this supplier
  creditLimit?: number;                // Max credit allowed
  currentBalance: number;              // Outstanding amount
  
  // Banking (for payments)
  bankDetails?: {
    bankName: string;
    accountName: string;
    accountNumber: string;
    branchCode: string;
    swiftCode?: string;                // For international
  };
  
  // Ratings & Performance
  rating?: number;                     // 1-5 stars
  totalPurchases: number;              // Total amount purchased
  totalOrders: number;                 // Number of POs
  onTimeDeliveryRate: number;          // % of on-time deliveries
  
  // System Fields
  isActive: boolean;
  createdBy: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
  
  // Zoho Integration
  zohoVendorId?: string;               // Zoho vendor ID
  isSyncedWithZoho: boolean;
  lastSyncAt?: Date;
  
  // Tags & Categories
  tags: string[];                      // For filtering
  category?: string;                   // "Raw Materials", "Services", etc.
}
```

### **3. `deliveryNotes` Collection**

**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/deliveryNotes/{dnId}`

```typescript
interface DeliveryNote {
  // Identification
  deliveryNoteNumber: string;          // "DN-2026-0001"
  purchaseOrderId: string;             // Reference to PO
  poNumber: string;                    // For display
  organizationId: string;
  
  // Delivery Information
  deliveryDate: Date;                  // When delivered
  receivedBy: string;                  // Name of person who received
  receivedBySignature?: string;        // Base64 image or URL
  
  // Items Delivered
  items: DeliveryItem[];               // What was delivered
  
  // Verification (from APK scanning)
  scannedItems: ScannedItem[];         // Barcode scan records
  verificationComplete: boolean;       // All items scanned?
  discrepancies: Discrepancy[];        // Missing/extra items
  
  // Condition Assessment
  itemsInGoodCondition: boolean;
  damageNotes?: string;
  damagePhotos?: string[];             // URLs to photos
  
  // PDF Generation
  pdfUrl?: string;                     // Generated PDF URL
  pdfGeneratedAt?: Date;
  
  // System Fields
  createdBy: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}
```

### **4. `shippingLabels` Collection**

**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/shippingLabels/{labelId}`

```typescript
interface ShippingLabel {
  // Identification
  labelNumber: string;                 // "SL-2026-0001"
  purchaseOrderId: string;
  deliveryNoteId?: string;
  
  // Shipping Details
  fromAddress: Address;                // Supplier address
  toAddress: Address;                  // Delivery address
  
  // Package Information
  packageType: string;                 // "Box", "Pallet", etc.
  weight: number;                      // KG
  dimensions: {
    length: number;
    width: number;
    height: number;
    unit: string;                      // "cm", "m"
  };
  
  // Courier Information
  courierService?: string;             // "PostNet", "DHL", etc.
  trackingNumber?: string;
  estimatedDeliveryDate?: Date;
  
  // Contents Summary
  items: {
    description: string;
    quantity: number;
  }[];
  
  // Barcode/QR Code
  barcodeData: string;                 // Encoded data
  qrCodeUrl?: string;                  // Generated QR code image
  
  // PDF Generation
  pdfUrl?: string;
  pdfGeneratedAt?: Date;
  
  // System Fields
  createdBy: string;
  createdAt: Date;
}
```

### **5. `poAuditLogs` Collection**

**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/purchaseOrders/{poId}/auditLogs/{logId}`

```typescript
interface POAuditLog {
  // Event Information
  eventType: AuditEventType;           // "created", "status_changed", etc.
  eventDescription: string;            // Human-readable description
  timestamp: Date;
  
  // User Information
  userId: string;
  userName: string;
  userEmail: string;
  userRole?: string;
  
  // Changes Made
  changes: {
    field: string;                     // Which field changed
    oldValue: any;                     // Previous value
    newValue: any;                     // New value
  }[];
  
  // Context
  ipAddress?: string;
  userAgent?: string;
  location?: string;                   // City/Country if available
  
  // Additional Data
  metadata?: Record<string, any>;      // Extra context
}
```

### **6. `poEmailLogs` Collection**

**Path:** `/organizations/{orgId}/purchaseOrders/{poId}/emailLogs/{emailId}`

```typescript
interface POEmailLog {
  // Email Details
  to: string[];                        // Recipient emails
  cc?: string[];
  bcc?: string[];
  subject: string;
  sentAt: Date;
  
  // Email Type
  emailType: EmailType;                // "po_sent", "po_approved", etc.
  
  // Attachments
  attachments: {
    filename: string;
    url: string;
    size: number;
  }[];
  
  // Status
  status: 'sent' | 'failed' | 'bounced';
  error?: string;
  
  // Tracking
  opened: boolean;
  openedAt?: Date;
  clicks: number;
  
  // System Fields
  sentBy: string;
  sentByName: string;
}
```

## 🔄 PO WORKFLOW & STATUS MANAGEMENT

### **PO Status Enum**

```typescript
enum POStatus {
  DRAFT = 'draft',                     // Being created/edited
  PENDING_APPROVAL = 'pending_approval', // Waiting for approval
  APPROVED = 'approved',               // Approved, ready to send
  REJECTED = 'rejected',               // Rejected by approver
  SENT = 'sent',                       // Sent to supplier
  ACKNOWLEDGED = 'acknowledged',       // Supplier confirmed receipt
  READY_TO_SHIP = 'ready_to_ship',    // Supplier preparing shipment
  SHIPPED = 'shipped',                 // In transit
  PARTIALLY_RECEIVED = 'partially_received', // Some items delivered
  RECEIVED = 'received',               // All items delivered
  CLOSED = 'closed',                   // PO completed
  CANCELLED = 'cancelled',             // Cancelled before fulfillment
  ON_HOLD = 'on_hold'                  // Temporarily paused
}
```

### **Status Transition Rules**

```typescript
const allowedTransitions: Record<POStatus, POStatus[]> = {
  [POStatus.DRAFT]: [
    POStatus.PENDING_APPROVAL,
    POStatus.APPROVED,               // If no approval required
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.PENDING_APPROVAL]: [
    POStatus.APPROVED,
    POStatus.REJECTED,
    POStatus.DRAFT,                  // Send back for edits
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.REJECTED]: [
    POStatus.DRAFT,                  // Revise and resubmit
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.APPROVED]: [
    POStatus.SENT,
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.SENT]: [
    POStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED,
    POStatus.READY_TO_SHIP,
    POStatus.ON_HOLD,
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED]: [
    POStatus.READY_TO_SHIP,
    POStatus.ON_HOLD,
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.READY_TO_SHIP]: [
    POStatus.SHIPPED,
    POStatus.ON_HOLD,
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.SHIPPED]: [
    POStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED,
    POStatus.RECEIVED,
    POStatus.ON_HOLD
  ],
  
  [POStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED]: [
    POStatus.RECEIVED,
    POStatus.CLOSED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.RECEIVED]: [
    POStatus.CLOSED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.ON_HOLD]: [
    POStatus.SENT,
    POStatus.ACKNOWLEDGED,
    POStatus.READY_TO_SHIP,
    POStatus.CANCELLED
  ],
  
  [POStatus.CLOSED]: [],             // Terminal state
  [POStatus.CANCELLED]: []           // Terminal state
};
```

---

## 🇿🇦 SOUTH AFRICAN ACCOUNTING COMPLIANCE

### **VAT Calculations**

```typescript
interface VATConfig {
  standardRate: 0.15;                  // 15% standard VAT rate
  zeroRated: string[];                 // Zero-rated categories
  exempt: string[];                    // VAT-exempt categories
}

// VAT Calculation
function calculateVAT(subtotal: number, vatRate: number = 0.15) {
  return subtotal * vatRate;
}

// Total with VAT
function calculateTotal(
  subtotal: number,
  vatAmount: number,
  shippingCost: number = 0,
  otherCharges: number = 0,
  discountAmount: number = 0
) {
  return subtotal + vatAmount + shippingCost + otherCharges - discountAmount;
}
```

### **Required Fields for SA Compliance**

```typescript
interface SAComplianceFields {
  // Supplier must have
  supplierTaxNumber: string;           // VAT number (format: 4123456789)
  supplierRegistrationNumber: string;  // CK/Registration number
  
  // PO must show
  vatAmount: number;                   // Clearly separated
  vatRate: number;                     // Display percentage
  subtotal: number;                    // Before VAT
  totalAmount: number;                 // Including VAT
  
  // On printed documents
  organizationTaxNumber: string;       // Buyer's VAT number
  taxInvoiceRequired: boolean;         // Request tax invoice?
}
```

### **PO Document Requirements**

**Every PO PDF must include:**
1. ✅ Company name and registration details
2. ✅ VAT registration number
3. ✅ Full postal addresses (buyer & supplier)
4. ✅ Date of issue
5. ✅ Unique PO number
6. ✅ Line-by-line breakdown with unit prices
7. ✅ Subtotal before VAT
8. ✅ VAT amount (clearly shown as 15%)
9. ✅ Total amount including VAT
10. ✅ Payment terms
11. ✅ Authorized signature (digital)

## 💱 MULTI-CURRENCY SUPPORT

### **Currency Configuration**

```typescript
interface CurrencyConfig {
  code: string;                        // "ZAR", "USD", "EUR"
  symbol: string;                      // "R", "$", "€"
  name: string;                        // "South African Rand"
  decimalPlaces: number;               // Usually 2
  isBaseCurrency: boolean;             // ZAR = true
}

// Supported currencies
const supportedCurrencies: CurrencyConfig[] = [
  { code: 'ZAR', symbol: 'R', name: 'South African Rand', decimalPlaces: 2, isBaseCurrency: true },
  { code: 'USD', symbol: '$', name: 'US Dollar', decimalPlaces: 2, isBaseCurrency: false },
  { code: 'EUR', symbol: '€', name: 'Euro', decimalPlaces: 2, isBaseCurrency: false },
  { code: 'GBP', symbol: '£', name: 'British Pound', decimalPlaces: 2, isBaseCurrency: false },
];
```

### **Exchange Rate Handling**

```typescript
interface ExchangeRate {
  fromCurrency: string;
  toCurrency: string;
  rate: number;
  effectiveDate: Date;
  source: string;                      // "manual", "api"
}

// Store exchange rates on PO at creation time
// Never recalculate historic POs with new rates
```

## 📝 PAYMENT TERMS

```typescript
enum PaymentTerms {
  COD = 'cod',                         // Cash on Delivery
  NET_7 = 'net_7',                     // Payment within 7 days
  NET_15 = 'net_15',                   // Payment within 15 days
  NET_30 = 'net_30',                   // Payment within 30 days
  NET_60 = 'net_60',                   // Payment within 60 days
  NET_90 = 'net_90',                   // Payment within 90 days
  ADVANCE = 'advance',                 // 100% advance payment
  CUSTOM = 'custom'                    // User-defined days
}

const paymentTermsLabels = {
  cod: 'Cash on Delivery',
  net_7: 'Net 7 Days',
  net_15: 'Net 15 Days',
  net_30: 'Net 30 Days',
  net_60: 'Net 60 Days',
  net_90: 'Net 90 Days',
  advance: 'Advance Payment',
  custom: 'Custom Terms'
};
```

## 📦 LINE ITEMS STRUCTURE

```typescript
interface POLineItem {
  lineNumber: number;                  // 1, 2, 3...
  
  // Product Reference
  productId?: string;                  // From inventory (if exists)
  sku?: string;                        // Product SKU
  barcode?: string;                    // For scanning
  
  // Description
  description: string;                 // What's being ordered
  notes?: string;                      // Additional details
  
  // Quantities
  quantityOrdered: number;             // How many ordered
  quantityReceived: number;            // How many actually received
  unit: string;                        // "EA", "KG", "L", "Box", etc.
  
  // Pricing
  unitPrice: number;                   // Price per unit
  discountPercentage: number;          // Line item discount %
  discountAmount: number;              // Calculated discount
  subtotal: number;                    // (qty * price) - discount
  vatRate: number;                     // Usually 0.15
  vatAmount: number;                   // Calculated VAT for line
  total: number;                       // Line total including VAT
  
  // Delivery
  expectedDeliveryDate?: Date;         // When this item expected
  actualDeliveryDate?: Date;           // When received
  
  // Status
  status: LineItemStatus;              // "pending", "received", "partial"
  isReceived: boolean;
  
  // Verification (from APK)
  scannedQuantity: number;             // Quantity verified via barcode
  verifiedBy?: string;                 // User who verified
  verifiedAt?: Date;
}

enum LineItemStatus {
  PENDING = 'pending',
  PARTIAL = 'partial',
  RECEIVED = 'received',
  CANCELLED = 'cancelled'
}
```

## 📧 EMAIL TEMPLATES

### **Email Types**

```typescript
enum EmailType {
  PO_SENT = 'po_sent',                         // PO sent to supplier
  PO_APPROVED = 'po_approved',                 // Internal: PO approved
  PO_REJECTED = 'po_rejected',                 // Internal: PO rejected
  PO_ACKNOWLEDGED = 'po_acknowledged',         // Supplier confirmed
  DELIVERY_NOTE = 'delivery_note',             // Delivery note sent
  SHIPPING_LABEL = 'shipping_label',           // Shipping label sent
  PO_REMINDER = 'po_reminder',                 // Payment/delivery reminder
  PO_CANCELLED = 'po_cancelled'                // PO cancellation notice
}
```

### **Email Template Structure**

```typescript
interface EmailTemplate {
  type: EmailType;
  subject: string;                     // With placeholders
  body: string;                        // HTML template
  attachments: string[];               // Which PDFs to attach
  
  // Placeholders available:
  // {{poNumber}}, {{supplierName}}, {{totalAmount}}, {{dueDate}}
  // {{organizationName}}, {{approverName}}, etc.
}
```

## 🔐 FIRESTORE SECURITY RULES

```javascript
// Firestore rules for Purchase Orders
rules_version = '2';
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
    
    // Purchase Orders
    match /organizations/{orgId}/purchaseOrders/{poId} {
      // Can read if part of organization
      allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      
      // Can create if part of organization
      allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId) 
                    && request.resource.data.createdBy == request.auth.uid;
      
      // Can update own draft POs, or if admin
      allow update: if isOrgMember(orgId) 
                    && (resource.data.createdBy == request.auth.uid 
                        || isAdmin(orgId));
      
      // Only admins can delete
      allow delete: if isAdmin(orgId);
      
      // Audit logs (subcollection)
      match /auditLogs/{logId} {
        allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
        allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId);
        allow update, delete: if false;  // Immutable
      }
      
      // Email logs (subcollection)
      match /emailLogs/{emailId} {
        allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
        allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId);
        allow update, delete: if false;  // Immutable
      }
    }
    
    // Suppliers
    match /organizations/{orgId}/suppliers/{supplierId} {
      allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow update: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow delete: if isAdmin(orgId);
    }
    
    // Delivery Notes
    match /organizations/{orgId}/deliveryNotes/{dnId} {
      allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow update: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow delete: if isAdmin(orgId);
    }
    
    // Shipping Labels
    match /organizations/{orgId}/shippingLabels/{labelId} {
      allow read: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow create: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow update: if isOrgMember(orgId);
      allow delete: if isAdmin(orgId);
    }
    
    // Helper functions
    function isOrgMember(orgId) {
      return request.auth != null 
             && exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/organizations/$(orgId)/users/$(request.auth.uid));
    }
    
    function isAdmin(orgId) {
      return isOrgMember(orgId) 
             && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/organizations/$(orgId)/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'admin';
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 🔢 PO NUMBER GENERATION

### **Auto-Generated Format**

```typescript
async function generatePONumber(orgId: string): Promise<string> {
  const year = new Date().getFullYear();
  const prefix = `PO-${year}-`;
  
  // Get counter from Firestore
  const counterRef = doc(db, 'organizations', orgId, 'counters', 'purchaseOrders');
  const counterSnap = await getDoc(counterRef);
  
  let nextNumber = 1;
  if (counterSnap.exists()) {
    nextNumber = counterSnap.data().lastNumber + 1;
  }
  
  // Update counter
  await setDoc(counterRef, {
    lastNumber: nextNumber,
    lastGeneratedAt: serverTimestamp()
  });
  
  // Format: PO-2026-0001
  return `${prefix}${String(nextNumber).padStart(4, '0')}`;
}
```

### **Zoho PO Numbers**

When syncing from Zoho:
- Use Zoho's PO number as-is
- Store in `poNumber` field
- Set `source: 'zoho'`
- Store Zoho ID in `zohoPoId`

---

## 📱 APK SCANNING WORKFLOW

### **Barcode Verification Process**

1. **User Opens PO in APK**
   - View list of expected items
   - See quantities ordered vs received

2. **Scan Items**
   - User scans barcode
   - System matches to line item
   - Increments `scannedQuantity`
   - Marks as verified when quantity matches

3. **Handle Discrepancies**
   - If scanned item not in PO → Alert user
   - If extra quantity scanned → Record as overage
   - If missing items → Mark as shortage

4. **Generate Delivery Note**
   - Once verification complete
   - Create delivery note document
   - Generate PDF
   - Capture signature if possible

5. **Create Shipping Label**
   - For items being shipped out
   - Include barcode/QR code
   - Print or save as PDF

---

## 🎨 UI/UX GUIDELINES

### **Dashboard Sidebar**

```
📊 Dashboard
📦 Inventory
📋 Stock Take
🧾 Purchase Orders  ← NEW (below Stock Take)
   - All Purchase Orders
   - Create New PO
   - Suppliers
   - Delivery Notes
   - Shipping Labels
👥 User Management
⚙️ Settings
```

### **PO List View Features**

- **Filters:** Status, Date Range, Supplier, Amount Range
- **Search:** PO number, supplier name, reference
- **Sort:** Date, Amount, Status, Supplier
- **Bulk Actions:** Export, Print, Send emails
- **Quick Stats:** Total POs, Total Value, Pending Approvals

### **PO Detail View Tabs**

1. **Overview** - Summary, status, amounts
2. **Line Items** - Products ordered
3. **Delivery & Shipping** - Tracking, delivery notes
4. **Payments** - Payment terms, history
5. **Documents** - PDFs, attachments
6. **Activity** - Audit trail, emails sent
7. **Communications** - Notes, messages

**Phase 2:** Dashboard implementation

- Map Zoho data to our schema
- Implement sync logic

**Phase 6:** Testing & refinement
- End-to-end workflow testing
- SA compliance verification
- Performance optimization
